Productivity.description: Number of machined castings produced by each worker in a 4-week period (40 hrs/week). Order: Traditional 20¢ (3), Traditional 30¢ (3), Traditional 40¢ (3), Disciplined 20¢ (3), Disciplined 30¢ (3), Disciplined 40¢ (3).

Incentive.description: Bonus amount in cents per casting paid for all castings produced in excess of 1,000 per worker during the 4-week period (quantitative predictor X1 in the interaction regression model).

Management_Style.description: Type of management practice at the manufacturing plant: Traditional or Disciplined (indicator predictor X2 in the interaction regression model). Each observation shares the same sample index as the corresponding Productivity and Incentive entries.
